stories.title: M's Raleigh lands on IL for first time in career
stories.summary: The Mariners placed catcher Cal Raleigh on the 10-day injured list on Thursday morning with a right oblique strain, the first IL stint of the AL MVP runner-up's career in his sixth major league season.

stories.title: UGA transfer arrested on drug charges, speeding
stories.summary: Georgia safety Ja'Marley Riddle was arrested May 8 on two felony charges for possession of a controlled substance and a misdemeanor speeding charge.

stories.title: Source: Oilers fire Knoblauch after two Cup Finals...
stories.summary: Despite leading the Oilers to back-to-back Stanley Cup Final appearances in 2024 and 2025 and having a contract extension that hadn't even begun, coach Kris Knoblauch has been fired.

stories.title: Arkansas reinstates tennis with boost in funding
stories.summary: The Arkansas tennis teams are back in business thanks to a short-term funding boost that the school's athletic director said "offers a viable path forward."

stories.title: Higgo late to tee time, gets 2-shot penalty at PGA...
stories.summary: Garrick Higgo finds himself in early contention at the PGA Championship despite a two-stroke penalty to begin his round after arriving one minute late for Thursday morning's tee time at Aronimink Golf Club.
